events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1149. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: low-sodium. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers American; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: stovetop. 10 meals/week, zone Richmond.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Meatloaf with Roasted Vegetables
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/700 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Baked Salmon with Quinoa
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 395/700 mg ✓, carbs 40 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Herb Roasted Chicken with Mashed Potatoes
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 430/700 mg ✓, carbs 43 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (100 servings, 7 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1149 added to route R-RICH-2 (Richmond), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1149: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
